name: Oatmeal Cookies/lo Cal
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray two baking sheets with nonstick cooking spray; set aside.
3. In a large bowl, beat margarine and sugar with an electric mixer on high speed until light and fluffy. Add egg and apple juice; beat until well combined.
4. In a medium bowl, combine oats, oat bran, baking powder, cinnamon, and salt.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients; mix until just combined.
6. Drop dough by tablespoonfuls about 2 inches apart onto prepared sheets. Use a spatula to flatten each cookie slightly.
7. Bake for 12-15 minutes or until lightly browned. Cool on a wire rack. Store in an airtight container.
8. Each serving (2 cookies) provides: 1 fat, 1 bread, and 35 optional calories. Per serving: 135 calories. Source: Weight Watcher magazine, May 1992.
